theme: Mallorca — Where Q3 corporate trips go to peak

linkedin.text:
Your HR team is googling "Ibiza vs French Riviera" right now. Both are the wrong answer.

Mallorca is the most underrated B2B destination in Europe — and Q3 is the window most directors miss entirely.

Why our clients picked it for 2026:
🏰 Renaissance fincas hosting 80-200 for closed-door retreats
⛵ Private cove dinners on yachts that never leave the bay
🚴‍♂️ Tramuntana cycling that builds teams without a single ropes course
📵 A Sa Dragonera day where phones lose signal for 4 hours — by design

The numbers that matter:
→ 3.5h direct from Tel Aviv
→ 25-30% cheaper than Ibiza for equivalent quality
→ June-October window, English fluency above Costa del Sol

Every group came back saying the same thing: "We've done dozens of these. This one actually changed something."

Q3 has 3 usable corporate weeks left in 2026. After that — it's 2027.

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call and we'll map your Mallorca window before it closes.

#Mallorca #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

facebook.text:
We sent a 90-person team to Mallorca last summer expecting "nice." 🏝️

They got Renaissance finca dinners, yacht cove evenings, and a Tramuntana ride that did more for the team than any ropes course ever could.

The CEO's words at the closing dinner: "This one actually changed something."

That's the difference between a beach holiday and the most underrated B2B destination in Europe.

→ 3.5h direct from Tel Aviv · 25-30% cheaper than Ibiza · June-October window
